creator: horikawa@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
security(7) refers `FreeBSD-3.0.1' as follows:
[snip]
HISTORY
     The security manual page was originally written by Matthew Dillon and
     first appeared in FreeBSD-3.0.1, December 1998.
[snip]

	I think that `FreeBSD-3.0.1' should be `FreeBSD 3.1' or
	something, because `FreeBSD-3.0.1' did not exist.

How-To-Repeat: 
	$ man 7 security
